§ 01Stewardship Overview

Following the successful closing of the ESOP transaction, Forhemit provides ongoing operational stewardship services as outlined in the COOP Stewardship Agreement. The annual stewardship fee is billed in {{billingFrequency}} tranches.

{{annualStewardshipFee}}
{{stewardshipRate}} of QofE-normalized TTM EBITDA
{{billingFrequency}}
{{trancheAmount}}
§ 02Payment Schedule
{{#each stewardshipTranches}} {{/each}}
TranchePeriodDue DateAmountStatus
{{trancheNumber}}{{period}}{{dueDate}}{{amount}}{{status}}
Year 1 Total{{year1Total}}
§ 03Payment Instructions
Novo Bank
Forhemit Stewardship Management Co.
{{routingNumber}}
{{accountNumber}}
Note: Please reference "{{ref}}-STEWARD" with each payment.
§ 04Terms

The stewardship fee is a tax-deductible business expense of the Company. It does not reduce seller proceeds and does not appear on the seller's closing statement. Payment is due per the schedule above; late payments accrue interest at 1.5% per month after a 15-day grace period.

The stewardship period may be terminated by either party with 30 days' written notice. Upon termination, any earned but unpaid fees remain due.

Forhemit Stewardship Management Co.
deals@forhemit.com | forhemit.com
CONFIDENTIAL
Stewardship Payment Schedule
